classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 该图展示了电机端面的机械结构剖视图，包含安装孔尺寸 '2-Φ15 -0.013'、公差 '0'、垂直高度尺寸 '20±1'、'1.6'、'47.4'、铭牌标注位置，以及法兰端面的轮廓形状和定位关系，属于典型的电机安装尺寸与机械结构图纸。

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Motor body has two mounting flanges on left and right sides, each with 20±1mm distance from flange face to body. Two Φ15mm mounting holes with tight tolerance (0/-0.013mm) indicated on left flange. Mounting boss thickness is 1.6mm.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Center body section length is 47.4mm between the two mounting flanges. Total assembled length would be approximately 20+47.4+20=87.4mm nominal.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Overall motor height, shaft dimensions, keyway, connector specifications not shown in this cropped view. Right mounting flange hole specifications not explicitly called out (may be symmetric to left side).

unresolved_items.reason: Low confidence (0.73) OCR read covering large area (370x144px). Overlaps spatially with ocr_002 and ocr_003 which are higher confidence. Likely OCR noise from attempting to read the entire top dimension line as one block. Rejected in favor of individual higher-confidence reads.

Low confidence (0.67) single character with no clear engineering meaning in context. Small bbox (11x15px) suggests OCR fragment. No visible corresponding annotation on drawing. Likely misread from dimension line or arrow.
Low confidence (0.65) isolated digit. Small bbox suggests fragment. Does not correspond to visible dimension callout. Likely part of tolerance notation already captured in T005 or OCR artifact.

Large vertical bbox (756px height) with low confidence (0.84). Spatially contains ocr_010 and ocr_008 which form part of the tolerance specification. This appears to be a misread of the vertical dimension line or multiple elements merged. The useful content (0 and -0.013) is already captured in T005.

Very low confidence (0.34) Chinese character '一' (one/horizontal line). Tiny bbox (15x16px). Likely misread of horizontal dimension line, dash, or minus sign already incorporated into tolerance notation in T005.

Vertical text read (90° angle) with high confidence (0.98) but ? symbol is OCR error for Φ. This reading is redundant with ocr_013 + ocr_010 + ocr_008 which provide the same information with better segmentation. T005 uses the better-segmented source_ids for cleaner merge logic.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 该图展示了步进电机法兰正视图，包含外形尺寸'□60'、法兰安装边长'□50±0.25'、输出轴直径'Φ36 -0.05'、定位孔'Φ12 +0.2/0 thru'、四个安装孔'4-Φ5 +0.3/0'、引线长度'320±20 4LEADS'等典型机械结构尺寸标注，并带有公差符号，属于电机零部件外形轮廓及安装孔定位尺寸图纸。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 该图显示编码器/反馈器的电气连接原理图，标明 'A+' 和 'A-' 差分信号线、电机 'M' 符号、制动器 'B+' 和 'B-' 接线，属于典型的反馈信号接口定义，包含信号功能标识和电气连接关系，符合 feedback_connector_pinout 类别的特征。

text_annotations.correction_note: OCR识别为W，根据图纸上下文应为电机符号M

terminology_notes: A+/A-/B+/B- are standard stepper motor phase terminal designations
M is standard motor symbol in electrical schematics
translation_notes: All terminal labels are international standard notation

engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Bipolar stepper motor with two-phase four-wire configuration. Phase A terminals: A+, A-. Phase B terminals: B+, B-. Connection to motor M through coil inductors shown in schematic.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Wire gauge, current rating, voltage rating, and coil resistance not specified in this schematic view. Refer to full technical drawing for electrical specifications.

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 图中显示了步进电机的励磁顺序表，明确列出了四根相线（'红 A+'、'红白 A-'、'绿 B+'、'绿白 B-'）的线色、针脚名称及其在顺时针和逆时针旋转时的极性（+/-）通电顺序，完全符合动力接口针脚功能、相线、线色、电源极性的定义要求。
